params.amount: Amount in USDC (6 decimals) for this milestone

params._daoToken: Address of the DAO governance token

params.amount: Amount of USDC (6 decimals) to contribute
params.campaignId: ID of the campaign to contribute to

returns.id: ID of the newly created campaign

params.milestoneId: ID of the milestone (0 for withdrawal disputes)

returns.disputeId: ID of the newly created dispute

params.milestoneId: ID of the milestone to release

params.disputeId: ID of the dispute to vote on
params.support: True to vote yes (support proposer), false to vote no (oppose proposer)

params.campaignId: ID of the campaign to withdraw from

addMilestone(uint256,string,uint256).notice: Add a milestone to a campaign (only creator)

campaignsCount().notice: Get the total number of campaigns

cancelAppeal(uint256).notice: Cancel an appeal (only appellant can cancel before voting ends)

cancelDispute(uint256).notice: Cancel a dispute (only proposer can cancel before voting ends)

createAppeal(uint256).notice: Create an appeal for an executed dispute (only after dispute execution)

createDispute(uint256,uint256,uint8).notice: Create a new dispute for a campaign or milestone

executeAppeal(uint256).notice: Execute an appeal if it passes (only after appeal voting period ends)

executeDispute(uint256).notice: Execute a dispute if it passes (only after voting period ends)

getCampaignIdFromDispute(uint256).notice: Get campaign ID from dispute (helper for testing)

getDisputeTypeFromDispute(uint256).notice: Get dispute type from dispute (helper for testing)

getDisputesForCampaign(uint256).notice: Get all dispute IDs for a campaign

getMilestoneIdFromDispute(uint256).notice: Get milestone ID from dispute (helper for testing)

getProposerFromDispute(uint256).notice: Get proposer from dispute (helper for testing)

rejectAppeal(uint256).notice: Reject an appeal if it fails (appeal execution reverses the original decision)

releaseMilestone(uint256,uint256).notice: Release funds for an approved milestone

voteOnAppeal(uint256,bool).notice: Vote on an appeal (yes = support keeping the original execution, no = support reversing it)

voteOnDispute(uint256,bool).notice: Vote on a dispute (yes = support the proposer, no = oppose the proposer)

withdraw(uint256).notice: Legacy: Withdraw all raised funds (without milestones)
